mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (number, status, user_id, address_book_id, order_time, checkout_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, remark, user_name, phone, address, consignee, cancel_reason, rejection_reason, cancel_time, estimated_delivery_time, delivery_status, delivery_time, pack_amount, tableware_number, tableware_status) VALUES (#{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{addressBookId}, #{orderTime}, #{checkoutTime}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{userName}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{consignee}, #{cancelReason}, #{rejectionReason}, #{cancelTime}, #{estimatedDeliveryTime}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{deliveryTime}, #{packAmount}, #{tablewareNumber}, #{tablewareStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.number, o.status, o.user_id, o.address_book_id, o.order_time, o.checkout_time, o.pay_method, o.pay_status, o.amount, o.remark, o.user_name, o.phone, o.address, o.consignee, o.cancel_reason, o.rejection_reason, o.cancel_time, o.estimated_delivery_time, o.delivery_status, o.delivery_time, o.pack_amount, o.tableware_number, o.tableware_status, od.id AS od_id, od.name AS od_name, od.setmeal_id AS od_setmeal_id, od.dish_id AS od_dish_id, od.dish_flavor AS od_dish_flavor, od.number AS od_number, od.amount AS od_amount, od.image AS od_image, od.order_id AS od_order_id FROM orders AS o LEFT JOIN order_detail AS od ON o.id = od.order_id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT id, number, status, user_id, address_book_id, order_time, checkout_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, remark, user_name, phone, address, consignee, cancel_reason, rejection_reason, cancel_time, estimated_delivery_time, delivery_status, delivery_time, pack_amount, tableware_number, tableware_status FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, number, status, user_id, address_book_id, order_time, checkout_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, remark, user_name, phone, address, consignee, cancel_reason, rejection_reason, cancel_time, estimated_delivery_time, delivery_status, delivery_time, pack_amount, tableware_number, tableware_status FROM orders
1=1
AND status = #{status}
AND #{time} > order_time

SELECT od.name, sum(od.number) number FROM order_detail od,orders o WHERE od.order_id = o.id AND o.status = 5
AND o.order_time > #{begin}
AND #{end}>o.order_time
GROUP BY od.name ORDER BY number DESC LIMIT 0,10
mapper.update:
update orders
cancel_reason=#{cancelReason},
rejection_reason=#{rejectionReason},
cancel_time=#{cancelTime},
pay_status=#{payStatus},
pay_method=#{payMethod},
checkout_time=#{checkoutTime},
status = #{status},
delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}
where id = #{id}
